inputs.label: Revenue Mean (μR)
inputs.businessContext: Expected average revenue (e.g., from Monte Carlo distribution mean).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average revenue (e.g., from Monte Carlo distribution mean).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beklenen ortalama gelir (örneğin Monte Carlo dağılım ortalamasından).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter durchschnittlicher Umsatz (z. B. aus dem Mittelwert der Monte-Carlo-Verteilung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu moyen attendu (par exemple, à partir de la moyenne de la distribution Monte Carlo).
businessContext_i18n.es: Promedio esperado de ingresos (ej. de la media de la distribución Monte Carlo).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الإيرادات المتوقعة (مثل متوسط توزيع مونت كارلو).

businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type des revenus (mesure de l'incertitude).
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar de ingresos (medida de incertidumbre).

inputs.label: Correlation (R,C)
inputs.businessContext: Correlation coefficient between revenue and cost (-1 to 1). 0 for independence.

businessContext_i18n.en: Correlation coefficient between revenue and cost (-1 to 1). 0 for independence.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelir ve maliyet arasındaki korelasyon katsayısı (-1 ile 1 arası). Bağımsızlık için 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Korrelationskoeffizient zwischen Einnahmen und Kosten (-1 bis 1). 0 für Unabhängigkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de corrélation entre les revenus et les coûts (-1 à 1). 0 pour l'indépendance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de correlación entre ingresos y costes (-1 a 1). 0 para independencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل الارتباط بين الإيرادات والتكلفة (-1 إلى 1). 0 للاستقلال.

inputs.label: Z-Score for CI
inputs.businessContext: Z-score for confidence interval (1.96 for 95%, 2.58 for 99%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Z-score for confidence interval (1.96 for 95%, 2.58 for 99%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güven aralığı için Z-skoru (%95 için 1.96, %99 için 2.58).
businessContext_i18n.de: Z-Score für das Konfidenzintervall (1,96 für 95 %, 2,58 für 99 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score Z pour l'intervalle de confiance (1,96 pour 95 %, 2,58 pour 99 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación Z para intervalo de confianza (1.96 para 95%, 2.58 para 99%).
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة Z لفترة الثقة (1.96 لمستوى ثقة 95%، 2.58 لمستوى ثقة 99%).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
